mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_logs (id, user_id, student_id, user_name, user_role, login_ip, login_time, user_agent, login_status, failure_reason) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{studentId}, #{userName}, #{userRole}, #{loginIp}, #{loginTime}, #{userAgent}, #{loginStatus}, #{failureReason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM login_logs ORDER BY login_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM login_logs WHERE
id IN
#{id}
1 = 0
